title: Create a value realization packet
persona: AI program owner with settings edit access
steps: Review live adoption, completed work, finance recovery, service impact, automation savings, ROI assumptions, and role-safe export preview.
expected: A persisted AssistantValueRealizationPacket is created with adoptionFunnelJson, valueAttributionJson, savingsJson, serviceImpactJson, cohortJson, roiAssumptionJson, exportReportJson, and leadershipSummary.
Estimated value includes avoided work cost, automation savings, and recovered finance value.
Export report JSON is role-safe and excludes user emails, customer names, invoice IDs, and source excerpts.
An AssistantAuditEvent is written, and no source telemetry, finance records, service records, or ROI claims are published or mutated automatically.

title: Queue value report review
persona: Executive sponsor with settings edit access
steps: Create or select a DRAFT value realization packet.
Add an approval note describing ROI assumptions and audience.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED with actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with actionKind assistant_value_realization_review.
An AssistantAuditEvent records that ROI claims, board reports, customer reports, finance records, service records, and source telemetry were not published or changed automatically.

title: Role-safe board/customer value report
persona: Customer success director with reports view access
steps: Open the Value workspace with reports access.
Inspect the live export guardrail and top attribution sections.
Create a value packet if permitted by edit grants or review an existing packet.
expected: The export report shows executive metrics, top attribution, audience labels, redaction mode ROLE_SAFE_SUMMARY, and guardrails.
No sensitive source identifiers are displayed in the report preview.
ROI and savings remain assumption-backed until a human queues and approves the review.
